sources.title: Frankenstein (1931)
sources.description: Frankenstein is a 1931 American pre-Code science fiction gothic horror film directed by James Whale, produced by Carl Laemmle Jr. , and adapted from the 1927 play Frankenstein: An Adventure in the Macabre by Peggy Webling, which in turn was based on Mary Shelley's 1818 novel Frankenstein; or, The Modern Prometheus. It follows  Dr. Henry Frankenstein, an obsessed scientist, assembles a creature from body parts of the deceased and brings it to life using electricity. However, the creature, portrayed by Boris Karloff, escapes and wreaks havoc, leading to tragic consequences as Frankenstein confronts the monster he created.

sources.title: Frankenstein 1931 colorized (Colin Clive, Boris Karloff)
sources.description: Dr. Frankenstein is obsessed with re-animating the dead. He succeeds in assembling a living being from parts of several exhumed corpses, creating a confused monster. Directed by James Whale Based on the book by Mary Shelley (in which Dr. Frankenstein is named Victor) Colin Clive as Henry Frankenstein Mae Clarke as Elizabeth John Boles as Victor Moritz Boris Karloff as The Monster Edward Van Sloan as Doctor Waldman Frederick Kerr as Baron Frankenstein Dwight Frye as Fritz I colorized this using AI software that doesn't always get the colors right, but I think it looks fairly natural. Hopefully a more professional job will be done someday.

sources.title: El Doctor Frankenstein 1931
sources.description: Basada en la historia de Mary Shelley sobre un científico que crea un ser viviente con cadáveres robados.

sources.title: Frankenstein ( 1931) Doblada Al Español FULL HD
sources.description: El doctor Henry Von Frankenstein acomete un experimento tenebroso: construir, a partir de fragmentos de cadáveres, un nuevo ser humano. Con la ayuda de su criado Fritz, se adentra durante la noche en los cementerios de la localidad para arrancar a los cadáveres las partes que necesita. Lo que ignora es que el cerebro que ha utilizado en su experimento había pertenecido a un criminal.

sources.title: Frankenstein 1931
sources.description: Based on Mary Shelley's story about a scientist who creates a living being from stolen corpses.

sources.title: Frankenstein (restored) (1931, pre-code horror, expressionist cinema, imdb score: 7.8)
sources.description: Frankenstein  is a 1931 American  pre-Code   science fiction   horror film  directed by  James Whale , produced by  Carl Laemmle Jr. , and adapted from a 1927 play by  Peggy Webling , which in turn was based on  Mary Shelley 's 1818 novel  Frankenstein; or, The Modern Prometheus . The Webling play was adapted by  John L. Balderston  and the screenplay written by  Francis Edward Faragoh  and  Garrett Fort , with uncredited contributions from  Robert Florey  and  John Russell .

sources.title: Frankenstein (restored, colorized) (1931, pre-code horror, expressionist cinema, imdb score: 7.8)
sources.description: Frankenstein is a 1931 American  pre-Code   science fiction   horror film  directed by  James Whale , produced by  Carl Laemmle Jr. , and adapted from a 1927 play by  Peggy Webling , which in turn was based on  Mary Shelley 's 1818 novel  Frankenstein; or, The Modern Prometheus . The Webling play was adapted by  John L. Balderston  and the screenplay written by  Francis Edward Faragoh  and  Garrett Fort , with uncredited contributions from  Robert Florey  and  John Russell .

metadata.Plot: Henry Frankenstein is a doctor who is trying to discover a way to make the dead walk. He succeeds and creates a monster that has to deal with living again.
metadata.Writer: John L. Balderston, Mary Shelley, Peggy Webling
metadata.Actors: Colin Clive, Mae Clarke, John Boles
